item.title: tony_calvin: AK BETS reposteó Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 1h QUESTIONS for Monday's @AKBets podcast on this thread please. Cita Tony

item.title: 6Dutchgold: Paddy Desmond @6Dutchgold · 7h “Approach to bookmaking” ? Cita At The Races @AtTheRaces · 21h "If I'd have gone to bed
item.description:
Paddy Desmond @6Dutchgold · 7h “Approach to bookmaking” ? Cita At The Races @AtTheRaces · 21h "If I'd have gone to bed the night before and dreamed of a result [it would have been] Mirabad in the first on the Saturday at 50/1!"
Tim Brown heads to @BangorRaces this afternoon and discusses his approach to bookmaking...
#TheInsideLine 1 2 948
